# CropInsurance.co.nz

> NZ crop insurance broker referral service. We help New Zealand growers — orchardists, viticulturists, arable and vegetable farmers — compare and find the right crop insurance through specialist brokers.

## About

CropInsurance.co.nz is a free broker referral service operated by Cover4You (trading style). We are not an insurer. We connect NZ growers with specialist licensed insurance advisers and brokers who compare products from FMG, Gallagher, Aon, Farmcover, and Howden.

Contact: hello@cover4you.co.nz

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.cropinsurance.co.nz/) — Crop insurance overview and quote form
- [Compare Providers](https://www.cropinsurance.co.nz/compare/) — FMG vs Gallagher vs Aon vs Farmcover vs Howden comparison
- [Get a Quote](https://www.cropinsurance.co.nz/contact/) — Free no-obligation broker referral form
- [FAQs](https://www.cropinsurance.co.nz/faqs/) — Common questions on crop insurance in NZ
- [Claims Guide](https://www.cropinsurance.co.nz/claims/) — How to make a crop insurance claim
- [About Us](https://www.cropinsurance.co.nz/about/) — Who we are and how we work
- [Blog](https://www.cropinsurance.co.nz/blog/) — Crop insurance guides and insights

- [Hop Grower Insurance](https://www.cropinsurance.co.nz/growers/hop-growers/)
- [Vegetable Grower Insurance](https://www.cropinsurance.co.nz/growers/vegetable-growers/)
- [Contract Grower Insurance](https://www.cropinsurance.co.nz/growers/contract-growers/)

## Insurance Providers

- **FMG** — NZ's largest rural insurer, farmer-owned, broad national adviser network. Strong named-perils and multi-peril crop programmes.
- **Gallagher NZ** — Global broker with specialist agribusiness division. Access to London and international crop insurance markets. Strong for large orchards and parametric weather solutions.
- **Aon NZ** — Global broker with NZ agribusiness team. Strong vineyard and viticulture expertise, global risk analytics, revenue protection products.
- **Farmcover NZ** — Specialist NZ farm insurer with competitive premiums and simple policies. Good for smaller operations.
- **Howden Group NZ** — International insurer network access, specialist reinsurance backing. Suited to large-scale operations.

## Key Topics

- Named Perils vs Multi-Peril Crop Insurance (MPCI)
- Revenue protection and yield shortfall cover
- Frost, hail, wind, PSA (kiwifruit), drought
- Cyclone Gabrielle and climate change impacts on NZ agriculture
- ICNZ Fair Insurance Code compliance
- FSCL and IFSO dispute resolution (0800 347 257 / 0800 888 202)
